name: Torox
description: Offerwall network (formerly OfferToro) for web and mobile apps with rewarded task-based user monetization.

seo.title: Torox — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Torox: Offerwall network (formerly OfferToro) for web and mobile apps with rewarded task-based user monetization.

when_to_use: Offerwall task-based monetization for web and mobile apps
CPI offer placements for app user acquisition campaigns
Rewarded task completion SDK for non-gaming app publishers

pros: Established offerwall reach across web and app
Long track record of publisher payouts
cons: Rebrand from OfferToro still causes confusion
Offer quality skews tier-2 and tier-3 geos
review.verdict: Serviceable offerwall incumbent, useful as a secondary source, not a category leader.
review.best_for: Web and app publishers wanting CPA offerwall coverage in emerging markets.
review.not_for: Premium apps where offer presentation and brand safety are priorities.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
